name: AgroChainUkraineVerification
description: End-to-end grain traceability, verification, and hybrid escrow payment service. Validates Ukrainian grain exports via UKAS labs, Derzhgeocadastre, SSUFSCP phytosanitary, and eCherha customs. Supports USDC (Solana L1) and EUR/USD (bank-partner) escrow payments triggered by border crossing confirmation.

serviceSpecCharacteristic.name: CropType
serviceSpecCharacteristic.description: Type of crop: Wheat, Corn, Sunflower, Barley

serviceSpecCharacteristic.name: PaymentMethod
serviceSpecCharacteristic.description: Escrow payment method: usdc_solana, fiat_eur, fiat_usd, hybrid

serviceSpecCharacteristic.name: PartnerBank
serviceSpecCharacteristic.description: EU/UA Banking partner for fiat escrow: credit_agricole, deutsche_bank, raiffeisen, revolut_business

serviceSpecCharacteristic.name: CryptoSharePercent
serviceSpecCharacteristic.description: Percentage of total amount paid in USDC (for hybrid payments, 0-100)

resourceSpecification.name: SolanaSmartContract
resourceSpecification.description: TradeEscrow Anchor program (USDC vault with auto-release on BORDER_CROSSED)

resourceSpecification.name: PaymentOracle
resourceSpecification.description: Microservice bridging eCherha customs data to Solana and EU Bank APIs (TMF 676)

resourceSpecification.name: NGSILDTranslator
resourceSpecification.description: Translates GrainLot data to ETSI NGSI-LD for COP-PILOT Context Broker
